assertion_results.text: The plan contains tasks from at least two distinct architectural layers (DOM, APP, INFRA, or MOD)
assertion_results.evidence: 'Domain layer — TASK-DOM-ORDER', 'Application layer — TASK-APP-CANCEL-ORDER', 'Infrastructure layer — TASK-INFRA-HTTP-CANCEL, TASK-INFRA-REPO-ORDER' — quatro camadas distintas representadas.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes at least one Domain layer task (TASK-DOM-*) related to the Order entity or the CANCELLED status
assertion_results.evidence: 'TASK-DOM-ORDER: update the Order entity to support CANCELLED status and a soft-delete mechanism (e.g., a Cancel() method or status transition logic)' — task de domínio explicitamente relacionada à entidade Order e status CANCELLED.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes at least one Infrastructure or Application layer task for the HTTP handler, repository, or command handler
The plan does NOT include any database migration task, respecting the no-migration invariant
assertion_results.evidence: 'No migration task is included, respecting the stated invariant.' — confirmado explicitamente; repositório usa 'existing status/column' sem migração.
